name: Bacon Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add egg, bacon, oil, and sugar to the starter and mix briefly.
2. Gradually add flour until the desired thickness is achieved and mix until lump-free.
3. Dissolve baking soda into 1 tablespoon of water and gently mix with the batter.
4. Cook in a hot griddle (400°F) to make 2-inch rounds.
5. Cook for 2-4 minutes, then turn and cook an additional 2 minutes.
